description: Represents a blog author profile with biographical and social information
name: BlogAuthor

id.description: Unique identifier for the blog author

name.description: Full display name of the author

avatar.description: URL to the author's avatar image

language.description: Language code for the author profile (e.g., en, es, fr)

translatedFromId.description: ID of the original author this was translated from

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the author was created

updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the author was last updated

deletedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the author was archived
